goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:30' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of theatre and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get price and train ID
